title: Verify report findings and map pack roots
summary: Validate the hardcoding assessment against the current repository and map the actual pack-root authority seams.
scope_items: Verify the report finding set against current code and governed artifacts

done_when_items: Every reported finding is marked valid, invalid, or partially valid with concrete repo evidence
